full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Understanding Bochner's theorem and its role in RFF derivation
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What is Bochner's theorem and why is it necessary for Random Fourier Features to work? Reference Section 2.1 of Yang et al. 2012
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Clarified that Bochner's theorem provides the Fourier transform decomposition that justifies sampling frequencies from the spectral distribution.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Confirmed by reading Section 2 (Preliminaries) of the paper, which explicitly invokes Bochner's theorem and cites Rahimi & Recht 2007.
